BacktestConfig.description: Configuration for a momentum backtest run.
BacktestConfig.title: BacktestConfig

BacktestRunResponse.description: Response returned immediately after submitting a backtest run.
BacktestRunResponse.title: BacktestRunResponse

BacktestSummaryRow.description:
Slim projection of ``csm_logs.backtest_results`` for listing endpoints.

Returned by :meth:`csm.adapters.mongo.MongoAdapter.list_backtest_results`.
Excludes the potentially-large ``equity_curve`` and ``trades`` arrays so
listing payloads stay cheap.

Attributes:
    run_id: Unique backtest run identifier.
    strategy_id: Strategy identifier.
    created_at: tz-aware result-generation timestamp (UTC).
    metrics: Summary metrics keyed by metric name.

metrics.description: Summary metrics keyed by metric name.
metrics.title: Metrics

BacktestSummaryRow.title: BacktestSummaryRow

DailyPerformanceRow.description:
One row of the ``db_gateway.daily_performance`` table.

Stores daily strategy-level metrics for cross-strategy aggregation.
``metadata`` is a JSONB catch-all for extensible metrics.

Attributes:
    time: tz-aware timestamp (UTC).
    strategy_id: Strategy identifier (e.g. ``"csm-set"``).
    daily_return: Day-over-day return (nullable).
    cumulative_return: Running total return (nullable).
    total_value: Total portfolio value in THB (nullable).
    cash_balance: Uninvested cash in THB (nullable).
    max_drawdown: Rolling max drawdown (nullable).
    sharpe_ratio: Rolling Sharpe ratio (nullable).
    metadata: JSONB catch-all for additional metrics.
DailyPerformanceRow.title: DailyPerformanceRow

EquityPoint.description:
One row of the ``db_csm_set.equity_curve`` hypertable.

Attributes:
    time: tz-aware timestamp (UTC).
    strategy_id: Strategy identifier (e.g. ``"csm-set"``).
    equity: Strategy equity value at ``time``.
EquityPoint.title: EquityPoint

db.description: Database connectivity status for quant-infra-db. None when db_write_enabled=False. Keys: 'postgres', 'mongo'. Values: 'ok' or 'error:<message>'.
db.title: Db

jobs_pending.description: Number of jobs in accepted state awaiting execution
jobs_pending.title: Jobs Pending

last_refresh_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent daily refresh (UTC)
last_refresh_at.title: Last Refresh At

last_refresh_status.description: Outcome of the most recent daily refresh
last_refresh_status.title: Last Refresh Status

public_mode.description: Whether the API is in public (read-only) mode
public_mode.title: Public Mode

scheduler_running.description: Whether the APScheduler background scheduler is active
scheduler_running.title: Scheduler Running

status.description: Service status — 'degraded' when scheduler unavailable or refresh failed
status.title: Status

JobRecord.description: Immutable snapshot of a single job's lifecycle.
JobRecord.title: JobRecord

PortfolioSnapshot.description:
Current portfolio state with holdings and summary metrics.

In public mode, holdings may be empty and summary_metrics are populated
from the pre-computed backtest summary JSON.  In private mode, holdings
come from the live portfolio state.

breaker_state.description: Drawdown circuit breaker state (NORMAL, TRIPPED, RECOVERING)
breaker_state.title: Breaker State

equity_fraction.description: Current equity allocation fraction after overlay adjustments
equity_fraction.title: Equity Fraction

summary_metrics.description: Key performance metrics (CAGR, Sharpe, Sortino, etc.)
summary_metrics.title: Summary Metrics

PortfolioSnapshot.title: PortfolioSnapshot

PortfolioSnapshotRow.description:
One row of the ``db_gateway.portfolio_snapshot`` table.

Stores daily cross-strategy aggregate state. ``allocation`` is a JSONB
column shaped for multi-strategy weights (e.g. ``{"csm-set": 1.0}``
today, ``{"csm-set": 0.6, "mean-rev": 0.4}`` in the future).

Attributes:
    time: tz-aware timestamp (UTC).
    total_portfolio: Combined portfolio value in THB (nullable).
    weighted_return: Allocation-weighted daily return (nullable).
    combined_drawdown: Cross-strategy combined drawdown (nullable).
    active_strategies: Number of strategies active on this day.
    allocation: Per-strategy weight dict (JSONB).
PortfolioSnapshotRow.title: PortfolioSnapshotRow

ProblemDetail.description:
RFC 7807 application/problem+json response body.

Fields ``type``, ``title``, and ``status`` carry defaults so existing code that
constructs ``ProblemDetail(detail=..., request_id=...)`` continues to work.  The
global exception handlers always populate the full RFC 7807 set.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence
detail.title: Detail

instance.description: Request path that triggered the error
instance.title: Instance

request_id.description: Unique request identifier for log correlation
request_id.title: Request Id

status.description: HTTP status code echoed in the body
status.title: Status

ProblemDetail.title: ProblemDetail

RefreshResult.description: Response returned immediately after submitting a data refresh job.

job_id.description: ULID of the submitted refresh job
job_id.title: Job Id

RefreshResult.title: RefreshResult

SignalRanking.description: Cross-sectional signal ranking for a given as-of date.
SignalRanking.title: SignalRanking

SignalRow.description:
A single ranked security with signal values.

Feature columns (mom_12_1, sharpe_momentum, etc.) and rank/quintile
columns are accepted as extra fields — the structure varies by signal set.
SignalRow.title: SignalRow

SignalSnapshotDoc.description:
One document of the ``csm_logs.signal_snapshots`` collection.

Stores a daily ranking array for a strategy, keyed on
``(strategy_id, date)``. Re-running daily refresh upserts the document.

Attributes:
    strategy_id: Strategy identifier (e.g. ``"csm-set"``).
    date: tz-aware timestamp (UTC) representing the trading day.
    rankings: Per-symbol ranking records (one entry per ranked symbol).
SignalSnapshotDoc.title: SignalSnapshotDoc

TradeRow.description:
One row of the ``db_csm_set.trade_history`` hypertable.

Attributes:
    time: tz-aware timestamp (UTC) when the trade was recorded.
    strategy_id: Strategy identifier (e.g. ``"csm-set"``).
    symbol: Traded ticker (e.g. ``"PTT"``).
    side: ``"buy"`` or ``"sell"``.
    quantity: Number of shares (positive).
    price: Execution price.
    commission: Commission paid (THB, includes broker + venue fees + VAT).
TradeRow.title: TradeRow

UniverseItem.description:
A single security in the stored universe.

Extra DataFrame columns (asof, sector, etc.) are accepted silently.
UniverseItem.title: UniverseItem

count.description: Number of items in the snapshot
count.title: Count

VolScalingConfig.description: Configuration for the volatility scaling engine.

fast_blend_weight.description: Weight on fast-window vol; 0 = slow only, 0.5 = equal blend
fast_blend_weight.title: Fast Blend Weight

VolScalingConfig.title: VolScalingConfig

post.description: Enqueue a private-mode backtest run with the given configuration. Returns a job ID immediately — poll ``GET /api/v1/jobs/{job_id}`` for completion status. Blocked in public mode.

404.description: Feature panel not available for backtest

post.description: Enqueue a data refresh job for the stored universe. Returns a job ID immediately — poll ``GET /api/v1/jobs/{job_id}`` for completion status. Blocked in public mode.

400.description: Universe snapshot is malformed (missing symbol column)

get.description: Return up to ``limit`` most-recent backtest summary rows from ``csm_logs.backtest_results``, descending by ``created_at``. The potentially-large ``equity_curve`` and ``trades`` arrays are excluded from this listing — fetch by ``run_id`` for the full document.

parameters.description: Maximum number of summary rows to return.
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of summary rows to return.
schema.title: Limit

get.description: Return a filtered list of job records, newest first. Private mode only — returns 403 in public mode.

schema.title: Response List Jobs Api V1 Jobs Get

get.description: Return the current state of a submitted job by its ULID. Available in both public and private modes (returns 404 in public mode since no jobs are ever created).
Return an index of pre-rendered analysis notebooks available for browsing.

304.description: Not Modified — ETag matches client cache

get.description: Return the current portfolio snapshot with holdings, summary metrics, market regime, and circuit breaker state. In public mode, reads from a pre-computed backtest summary JSON. In private mode, reads from the live portfolio state.

304.description: Not Modified — ETag matches client cache

500.description: Portfolio payload is malformed or store read failed

post.description: Manually trigger a scheduler job by its ID. Returns a job ID immediately — poll ``GET /api/v1/jobs/{job_id}`` for completion status. Blocked in public mode.

get.description: Return the latest cross-sectional signal ranking. In public mode, reads from a pre-computed JSON export. In private mode, computes live from the feature pipeline.

304.description: Not Modified — ETag matches client cache

500.description: Signals payload is malformed or store read failed

get.description: Return the current stored universe with constituent metadata.

304.description: Not Modified — ETag matches client cache

404.description: Universe snapshot not found in the parquet store

get.description: Return service status, application version, public-mode flag, scheduler status, last-refresh information, and pending job count.
